result.summary: The page has a couple of noticeable layout problems: some content is clipped off the right edge, and the fixed bottom navigation is covering the lower game cards. There are also a few truncated labels that make the interface feel cramped.

issues.description: Several game tiles in the main grids are cut off on the right side of the screen, with titles and labels partially hidden off-canvas.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid/card widths and spacing so all columns fit within the viewport, or convert these rows into a proper horizontally scrollable carousel with visible affordance.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the lower game section, hiding part of the content and making those items hard to see or tap.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the page content to account for the fixed nav bar, or make the bottom bar non-overlapping.

issues.description: The top category pill on the right is truncated ('Hot Ga...'), which makes the label look unfinished.
issues.suggestion: Widen the pill, reduce the text size, or shorten the label so the full category name is visible.
